sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ مَوَاقِعَ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo ljudi svakodnevno koristi društvene mreže.
sentences.translationEn: Many people use social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الشَّبَابُ مَشَارَكَةَ الصُّوَرِ الْجَمِيلَةِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Mladi vole dijeliti lijepe fotografije sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Young people love sharing beautiful photos with their friends.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ فِي الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى اتِّصَالٍ دَائِمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice pomažu u održavanju stalnog kontakta.
sentences.translationEn: These sites help in staying in constant contact.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا تَنْظِيمُ الْوَقْتِ أَمَامَ الشَّاشَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali moramo organizovati vrijeme ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: But we must organize our time in front of the screen.
